2189840.name: JellyCar Worlds Original Soundtrack
2189840.description:
The iconic music from the JellyCar series is all here in the official JellyCar Worlds Original Soundtrack.

Featuring

  • All of the songs from the original JellyCar games
  • 17 brand new songs composed for JellyCar Worlds
  • 4 Special "Full Version" (with lyrics!) tracks

All songs Performed by Matthew McCarthy; Vocals by Matthew McCarthy; Additional Vocals by Brenna McCarthy
